text: As you have stated before, is a straight and narrow. There are many descriptions. Create an introduction, shall I say, with the law of one. Traveling through the nearly high points of the 75,000 or so. Possibly. A few questions into the general future. After this introduction to the law, as I call it, I would like to get directed to the main work, which is creating an understanding that can be disseminated to those who would ask for it, but only to those who ask for it. Or an understanding that can allow them to create some evolution. I hope that we get a power that's my face. I have a question. She says, we speak of various types of energy blockages and transfers positive and negative that may take place due to participation in our sexual reproductive conquest of actions. She states, please explain these passages of energy transfers with emphasis upon on an individual seeking to be in accordance with the law of one may positively do in this area. Is it possible for you to answer this question? I am la it is partially possible given the background we have laid. The first energy transfer is red ray. It is a random transfer having a to and do only with your reproductive system the orange and the yellow gray attempts to have a sexual intercourse create firstly a blockage if only one entity vibrates in this area, thus causing the entity vibrating sexually in this area to have a never ending apetite for this activity. What these vibratory levels are seeking is a green ray activity. There is the possibility of orange or yellow array, energy, a transfer, this a being, a polarizing towards the negative, one a being a seen as object rather than other self, the other seeing itself as plunderer or master of the situation. There are two possibilities. Thus being physically revitalized the positive or male polarity as it is a deemed in your illusion, finding in this energy transfer an inspiration which satisfies and feeds the spirit portion of the body, mind, spirit complex, thus both being polarized and releasing the excess of that which each has in abundance by nature of intelligent energy that is negative, intuitive, positive physical energies, as you may call them, this energy transfer being blocked only if one or both entities have fear of a possession of being possessed of desiring possession or desiring being possessed. The other green ray possibility is that of one entity offering green ray energy, the other, a not offering energy of the universal love energy, this resulting in a blockage of energy for the one not green ray, thus increasing frustration or appetite, the green ray being polarizing slightly towards service to others. The blue ray energy transfer is somewhat rare among your people at this time, but is of great aid due to energy transfers involved in becoming able to express the self without reservation or fear. This is the sacramental portion of the body complex whereby contact may be made through the violet ray with intelligent infinity. No blockages may occur at these latter two levels due to the fact that if both entities are not ready for this energy, it is not visible and neither transfer nor blockage may take place. It is as though the distributor were removed from a powerful engine. This instrument was able as an example of this working to baffle the Orion group enduring experiences as you call this substance due to the fact that it effectively completely opened other self to third ray. We correct this instrument, it is growing low in vital energy, green array energy and partially opening other self to blue ray interaction. May we ask if you have any queries before we close.
